name: Crypt Ritual Ambush
description: Cultists defend their unholy ritual chamber deep beneath the swamp church!

swamp_church_complete.display_message: The cultists fall, but their leader escapes through a hidden passage! You find documents confirming the kidnappings.

special_rules.description: Cult Priest may escape when HP drops below 25%

ambient_description: Candles flicker around a ritual circle drawn in blood and ash. The cultists turn to face you, weapons drawn.
victory_description: The cultists collapse, their dark ritual interrupted. The cult priest vanishes in a swirl of shadows, escaping through a hidden passage. You find incriminating documents scattered around the ritual circle.
defeat_description: You retreat from the crypt, wounded and overwhelmed. The cultists' laughter echoes behind you as you flee.
